creator: unitrunker@gmail.com
text:
Ran this on a T440p with 12.1-RELEASE-p6

dmesg with invert option un-checked:

rtsx0: <Realtek RTS5227 PCI MMC/SD Card Reader> mem 0xf0500000-0xf0500fff at device 0.0 on pci1
rtsx0: Card present
mmc0: <MMC/SD bus> on rtsx0
rtsx0: Controller timeout
rtsx0: Soft reset
rtsx0: Controller timeout
rtsx0: Soft reset
rtsx0: Controller timeout
rtsx0: Soft reset
rtsx0: Controller timeout
rtsx0: Soft reset
rtsx0: Controller timeout
rtsx0: Soft reset
rtsx0: Controller timeout
rtsx0: Soft reset
rtsx0: Controller timeout
rtsx0: Soft reset
rtsx0: Controller timeout
rtsx0: Soft reset
rtsx0: Controller timeout
rtsx0: Soft reset
rtsx0: Controller timeout
rtsx0: Soft reset
rtsx0: Controller timeout
rtsx0: Soft reset
rtsx0: Controller timeout
rtsx0: Soft reset

dmesg with invert option checked:

rtsx0: <Realtek RTS5227! PCI MMC/SD Card Reader> mem 0xf0500000-0xf0500fff at device 0.0 on pci1
rtsx0: Card absent
